segments.text: TUTOR: Hello, Sandy. How have you been getting on with your dissertation?
segments.translation: 导师：你好，姗迪。你的毕业论文进展如何？

segments.text: SANDY: Fine, and I've been working hard on the various action points we agreed on our last tutorial.
segments.translation: 姗迪：还行，我一直在努力的完成上次课后辅导我们说好的那些任务。

segments.text: TUTOR: Do you want to talk me through what you've done?
segments.translation: 导师：你想跟我谈谈你都完成哪些了吗？

segments.text: SANDY: Yeah, sure. Well, we agreed on three main targets for me to aim for.
segments.translation: 姗迪：必须的。我们上次明确了三个主要的目标需要我来完成。

segments.text: The first one was to find out about suitable data analysis software.
segments.translation: 第一个是寻找合适的数据分析软件。

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes.
segments.translation: 导师：对。

segments.text: SANDY: And what I decided to do was to look through catalogues specializing in IT.
segments.translation: 姗迪：然后我决定的是翻阅一些专注于互联网科技方面的目录册。

segments.text: TUTOR: That's a good idea. What did you come up with?
segments.translation: 导师：这是好主意。你都得到了些什么信息？

segments.text: SANDY: I found the names of two promising ones.
segments.translation: 姗迪：我找到了两个有用的软件的名字。

segments.text: TUTOR: Right.
segments.translation: 导师：好的。

segments.text: SANDY: But I also thought it'd be worthwhile talking to a lecturer.
segments.translation: 姗迪：不过我还是觉得应该找位讲师来交流一下。

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh right. Who did you see?
segments.translation: 导师：可以啊。你去着了谁呢？

segments.text: SANDY: Jane Prince. Do you know her?
segments.translation: 姗迪：简普林斯。您知道她吗？

segments.text: She's in the Computer Centre.
segments.translation: 她在计算机中心。

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, of course, she's the new Head.
segments.translation: 导师：知道啊，当然了，她是新任的主管。

segments.text: SANDY: Yes. Well, she was very helpful.
segments.translation: 姗迪：对。她提供的帮助非常有用。

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh, that's good. Did she suggest anything in particular?
segments.translation: 导师：不错。她有没有特别建议些什么？

segments.text: SANDY: Yeah. She recommended software called Vivat and said I should book up for a couple of practice sessions using Vivat.
segments.translation: 姗迪：有啊。她推荐了一个软件叫做维瓦特，而且她说我可以预约一些使用维瓦特软件的练习课程。

segments.text: TUTOR: Great. I'm sure you'll find them useful.
segments.translation: 导师：好极了。我确定你会觉得那些课很有用的。

segments.text: SANDY: And, of course, the second target was to draw up a survey checklist which I...
segments.translation: 姗迪：然后第二个目标是要我起草一个调查清单，我已经……

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, you emailed me it last week.
segments.translation: 导师：是的，你上周发邮件给我了。

segments.text: SANDY: Have you had a chance to look...?
segments.translation: 姗迪：您有时间看吗……？

segments.text: TUTOR: Of course, um I think it's good.
segments.translation: 导师：当然有了，呵呵，我觉得那个清单不错。

segments.text: Very much on the right lines.
segments.translation: 主线非常明确。

segments.text: I'd say your first two sections are spot on.
segments.translation: 我得说你的前两个部分是非常到位的

segments.text: I wouldn't suggest that you change anything there, but in section three you really do need to have questions on teaching experience.
segments.translation: 前两个部分我不建议你改换任何地方，不过在第三部分你确实需要增加一些关于教学背景的问题。

segments.text: SANDY: Yeah. I was thinking that section looked a bit short.
segments.translation: 姗迪：好的。我也觉得那部分看上去有点短。

segments.text: TUTOR: Right.
segments.translation: 导师：是的。

segments.text: SANDY: And my third target was, do further reading on discipline.
segments.translation: 姗迪：我的第三个目标是关于纪律方面进行进一步的阅读。

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh yes. I mentioned a couple of writers, didn't I?
segments.translation: 导师：对。我之前提了一些作者的书对吧？

segments.text: SANDY: Yes, well I got hold of the Banerjee and I thought that was excellent.
segments.translation: 姗迪：是的，我拿到了班耐吉的书还觉得挺高兴的。

segments.text: But I'm afraid I didn't manage to get hold of the essays about classroom management - you know, the ones by Simon Ericsson.
segments.translation: 不过我恐怕拿不到西蒙埃里克森写的关于教室管理的文章了。

segments.text: The bookshop said it was out of print and the library doesn't have a copy.
segments.translation: 书店说这个已经不再版了而且图书馆也没有影印版。

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh right, and I'm afraid I've lent my copy to another student.
segments.translation: 导师：好吧，不过恐怕我已经把我的那份影印版借给其他学生了。

segments.text: What I suggest you do is try the library again - this time apply for it through the service called special loans.
segments.translation: 我能提供的建议是再试试图书馆，这次通过那个叫做特殊借阅的服务来申请。

segments.text: Have you done that before?
segments.translation: 你之前这么借过书吗？

segments.text: You're entitled to six books a year.
segments.translation: 你是可以授权每年这样节约6本书的。

segments.text: SANDY: Yes. No problem. That's what I'll do.
segments.translation: 姗迪：借过的。没问题。我回去试试。

segments.text: TUTOR: So, lots of useful work done.
segments.translation: 导师：嗯，确实做了很多有用的功课。

segments.text: TUTOR: So, let's look at some new targets.
segments.translation: 导师：现在我们来看看新的目标。

segments.text: We'll start by having a chat about your Chapter One.
segments.translation: 我们先来聊聊你的第一章节。

segments.text: I very much enjoyed reading it.
segments.translation: 我非常喜欢读这部分。

segments.text: Your written style is very clear and you've included lots of interesting descriptions of education in your target area.
segments.translation: 你的写作风格非常清晰，而且在你的目标领域你还对教育学进行了很多有趣的描述。

segments.text: I've just got a couple of suggestions for some additional work.
segments.translation: 我只对额外的一些内容有些许的建议。

segments.text: SANDY: Of course. Could I just ask - what do you think I should call it?
segments.translation: 姗迪：好的，我能不能先问一下，您觉得我应该给第一章节起个什么名字呢？

segments.text: TUTOR: Well, I'd go for something like Context Review.
segments.translation: 导师：我觉得我会把它叫做背景回顾之类的。

segments.text: What do you think?
segments.translation: 你觉得呢？

segments.text: SANDY: Well, short and to the point.
segments.translation: 姗迪：好啊，简短又切题。

segments.text: TUTOR: Exactly. Now, as regards specific areas to work on, I'd be quite interested to have a few more statistics about the schools in the different zones.
segments.translation: 导师：是的。下面，考虑到研究的特定领域，我很想得到更多的关于多种不同地区学校的数据。

segments.text: SANDY: Oh, that wouldn't be a problem.
segments.translation: 姗迪：这个不会成问题

segments.text: I can get them from the Internet.
segments.translation: 我可以从网上找到。

segments.text: TUTOR: Great, and although you did make a reference to quite a few different writers, I think you should aim to cite more works written later than 2000.
segments.translation: 导师：好极了，而且虽然你确实在参考文献中列出了一些不同的作者，不过我觉得你还应该多引用一些2000年以后出版的参考文献内容。

segments.text: SANDY: OK. That's more difficult, but I can try.
segments.translation: 姗迪：可以。这有点难度，不过我会试试看的。

segments.text: When do you want that done by?
segments.translation: 您需要什么时候完成呢？

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh, it's not urgent.
segments.translation: 导师：噢，这个不着急。

segments.text: Um I should aim for the end of term.
segments.translation: 我会把完成时间定在学期末。

segments.text: But in the meantime, I think you should also be thinking about Chapter Two.
segments.translation: 与此同时，我觉得你可以想想第二章节的事。

segments.text: SANDY: Should I be drafting it already?
segments.translation: 姗迪：我现在就该开始起草了吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: No, but I think you should note down its main sections.
segments.translation: 导师：不用，不过我觉得你应该记录下它的主要部分。

segments.text: SANDY: Yes. You know, I always find that the hardest part.
segments.translation: 姗迪：好的。您知道我一直觉得这是最难的部分。

segments.text: TUTOR: I always find it helpful to put some ideas on index cards.
segments.translation: 导师：我一直觉得把想法写在目录卡片上会很有帮助。

segments.text: SANDY: Yeah.
segments.translation: 姗迪：是的。

segments.text: TUTOR: Um...and then you can sort them, and even lay them out on the floor. It's a real help.
segments.translation: 导师：嗯......然后你可以把他们分类，甚至把他们铺在地板上。特别有用。

segments.text: SANDY: Well, I'll certainly try it! When would the deadline be for that?
segments.translation: 姗迪：好的，我会试试看的！这个的截止日期是什么时候呢？

segments.text: TUTOR: My advice would be to get it done before you embark upon the research.
segments.translation: 导师：我的建议是在你着手开始研究之前完成它。

segments.text: You can always change it later if you need to.
segments.translation: 你也可以延期如果你需要的话。

segments.text: SANDY: OK. I'll get going on that then.
segments.translation: 姗迪：好的。那我开始做吧。
